posts.text: The rich prophetic legacy of my dear brother Rev. Jesse Jackson Sr. must not be confined to the mediocre Democratic Party — social movements of liberation go beyond the corrupt two-party system! #TruthJusticeLove @therealtavissmiley @pastorpfleger @rabbistevenbjacobs @kbla1580 kbla1580

posts.text: Yesterday, we honored the life and witness of Jesse Jackson Sr. a freedom fighter who reminded America that justice is what love looks like in public! He stood in the great prophetic tradition—telling the truth, lifting up the poor, and insisting that every child of God has dignity! His voice carried the cry of the marginalized and the hope of a more compassionate democracy! As we reflect today, may we remember that his legacy is not just in history but in the ongoing struggle for spiritual inte

Generations of civil rights leadership in one room.

Attorney Ben Crump and scholar Cornel West greet one another as leaders, activists and community members gather in Chicago to celebrate the life and legacy of Rev. Jesse Jackson.

#JesseJackson #BETRemembers

posts.text: Martin Luther King Jr. said, “Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere,” reminding us that as we consistently condemn war, we must also affirm that people have the right to resist oppression and stand against unjust regimes! #TruthJusticeLove @therealtavissmiley @kbla1580

posts.text:
We’re not just facing a political crisis — we’re facing a spiritual one! When greed is normalized, truth is disposable, and cruelty is marketed as strength, the soul of the nation is at stake! This isn’t about one man. It’s about a moral decay that rewards corruption and punishes integrity. We must call our young people back to courage, truth, justice, and love! #TruthJusticeLove 
@cnn_newsnight

posts.text:
A tribute to the life and legacy of Jesse Jackson, led by @therealtavissmiley and @kbla1580 in Los Angeles at the historic AME Church on Friday, February 27, featuring distinguished speakers including Mayor Karen Bass, Dolores Huerta, Jessie Jackson Jr, and my beloved husband, Cornel West♥️#TruthJusticeLove #IAmSomebody 🌈 
photos by:Karim Saffir
